name: Cypher Tempre
description: Timechain self-model wearing: pinned-window context engine (first turn + recent turns, no summarizing compaction) plus primer/reminder auto-append.

keepTurns.description: Maximum recent turns kept in context (including the current turn). Default 15.

tokenCeiling.description: Approximate token ceiling for assembled context. Default 256000.

evictionBatch.description: Evict oldest turns in batches of this size (prompt-cache hysteresis). Default 1 = exact minimum eviction.

primer.description: Prepend the full wearing primer to the system prompt on every run. Default true.

reminder.description: Append the short per-turn reminder near the user message. Default true.

skillDir.description: Path to the cypher-tempre-self-model skill. Default ~/.openclaw/skills/cypher-tempre-self-model.
